life_history: Noah has a history of academic challenges and underachievement, despite being intelligent. He experienced a negative college experience at Grinnell, feeling isolated and disconnected, which led to dropping out and developing bitterness toward education. He has not completed college, with about two years of credits remaining. Noah has faced high expectations from his mother, leading to feelings of perceived failure. Financial troubles have compounded these issues, resulting in pressure to return home, further complicating their relationship.
core_belief_description: Helpless: I am incompetent. I am helpless. I am a failure, loser.
Worthless: I am worthless, a waste.
intermediate_beliefs: I must meet my parents' expectations; otherwise, I'm a failure.
I must work hard and stay productive to avoid failure.
intermediate_beliefs_during_depression: I'm not competent for anything. I keep failing to meet expectations of myself and others. I'm a worthless person.
coping_strategies: Controlling situations and making plans to cope with feelings of inadequacy.
Isolating oneself to work and possibly procrastinating to avoid confronting feelings of failure.

cognitive_models.situation: Experienced an unproductive week due to mistakes in planning.
cognitive_models.automatic_thoughts: I'm a pathetic person. I'm never good at planning or organizing my time. I'm going to fail again, no wonder my parents are disappointed about me.
cognitive_models.emotion: sad, down, lonely, unhappy; ashamed, embarrassed, humiliated
cognitive_models.behavior: Acknowledges the week was unproductive, ultimately feeling like a failure.

cognitive_models.situation: Seeking help from parents due to financial troubles.
cognitive_models.automatic_thoughts: I cannot finish college due to my incompetency, and need to rely on parents for a living. I'm so pathetic and a failure.
cognitive_models.emotion: sad, down, lonely, unhappy; ashamed, embarrassed, humiliated
cognitive_models.behavior: Keeps ruminating about the past and remains inactive for future plans.
